channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Cricket Australia BBL Privatisation Pause: What Indian Fans Need to Know
item.description: Cricket Australia's BBL privatisation plan is facing serious resistance from major state cricket boards. NSW wants a pause, and Queensland is undecided—a significant setback for the restructuring plan. This matters to Indian cricket fans because it shows how tricky domestic league reforms are, even in established cricket nations.

item.title: Kartik Aaryan's Naagzilla Postponed to Valentine's 2027
item.description: Kartik Aaryan's fantasy-comedy Naagzilla has been rescheduled from August 2026 to Valentine's Day 2027 by Dharma Productions. The film will release in US theatres during the romantic weekend before hitting Netflix and Prime Video approximately 4-6 weeks later, giving Indian diaspora another major Bollywood release to anticipate in 2027.

item.title: Toaster Netflix April 2025: Rajkummar Rao New Movie
item.description: Toaster, a quirky new Bollywood comedy starring Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra, premiered on Netflix April 15, 2025. The film features hilarious cameos from Farah Khan and Pratik Gandhi and marks the lead couple's production debut. Stream it now on Netflix in the US with your existing subscription.

item.title: LSG Unleashes Match-Ready Mayank vs RCB in IPL 2026
item.description: LSG's young speedster Mayank Yadav is finally ready for his IPL 2026 debut against RCB after weeks of careful conditioning. This is a major turning point for both the franchise and Indian cricket fans watching from the US, marking the arrival of a potentially game-changing talent in the tournament.

item.title: IPL 2026 Purple Cap Race: Kamboj Levels Prasidh at Top
item.description: IPL 2026 is hitting peak excitement! Kamboj has matched Prasidh's wicket count to lead the Purple Cap race after Match 22, while a new face has cracked the Orange Cap top 5. If you're catching India cricket live scores from the US, this mid-tournament reshuffle means the race for individual awards—and playoff spots—is completely open. Follow Willow TV for live coverage.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Deepti Sharma & Mitchell Starc Win Wisden's Leading Cricketers 2026
item.description: Deepti Sharma becomes Wisden's Leading Cricketer in the World for 2026, with four Indians total named among Wisden's top five Cricketers of the Year. This recognition shows India's dominance in global cricket and highlights where to watch these stars perform for US-based fans.

item.title: AI Skepticism Rising: What It Means for Your Tech Career in 2026
item.description: Young U.S. adults distrust AI, but this creates opportunity for engineers who build trustworthy, explainable systems. Indian tech pros who combine strong coding with ethics and user-centered thinking will command premium salaries and job security in 2026.

item.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai: Varun Dhawan's 2026 Bollywood Love Triangle
item.description: David Dhawan's romantic drama 'Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai' premieres April 14 with Varun Dhawan caught between Pooja Hegde and Mrunal Thakur. Expected on Disney+ Hotstar/Prime Video in the US within weeks—perfect for Indian diaspora fans seeking feel-good Bollywood entertainment.

item.title: Ek Din Movie 2026: Bollywood's Bold 39-Day Booking Strategy Explained
item.description: Bollywood's latest strategy shift: Ek Din opens advance bookings 39 days early, signaling producer confidence and a new release playbook. The Junaid Khan & Sai Pallavi film will hit Indian theaters in May-June 2026, then likely stream on Netflix India or Prime Video by July-August. Perfect for diaspora seeking thoughtful, character-driven Indian cinema.

item.title: Dhoni Recovery Update: IPL 2025 Keeping Doubts Linger
item.description: MS Dhoni returned to nets at Chepauk but skipped wicketkeeping duties—a cautious sign ahead of CSK's IPL 2025 clash with KKR. His recovery is stretching longer than expected, meaning the superstar's availability remains uncertain. For US-based fans, this impacts both CSK's immediate prospects and watchability of upcoming matches.

item.title: Hasan Ali Joins Yorkshire for T20 Blast 2026 Season
item.description: Pakistan seamer Hasan Ali joins Yorkshire for the T20 Blast 2026, replacing injured Naveen-ul-Haq. This move gives the experienced international bowler valuable match practice while helping Yorkshire's domestic campaign. For Indian diaspora tracking global cricket alongside IPL 2025 and ICC Champions Trophy updates, Hasan's form in English conditions matters for understanding Pakistan's strength ahead of major tournaments.

item.title: Bhooth Bangla Release Date 2025: UA Rating & Runtime Update
item.description: Bhooth Bangla, an upcoming Bollywood horror-comedy, has received its UA 16+ certification with a final runtime of 164 minutes after CBFC-approved edits. The film is cleared for theatrical release in India and will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Hotstar US within 4-6 weeks of its debut, making it a must-watch for Indian diaspora audiences seeking new Bollywood content.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Modest Forward Movement Expected
item.description: EB-2 India is expected to move forward by approximately 12-14 days in May 2026, bringing the Final Action Date to around July 27-29, 2014. This represents a return to normal monthly movement after an exceptional surge in January, with low retrogression risk but persistent uncertainty due to the unpredictable 304-day jump earlier this year.

item.title: Swanepoel Gets NOC: IPL Dream Alive Amid Disciplinary Action 2026
item.description: Beyers Swanepoel has received his NOC from CSA and can now play in IPL 2025, but South African cricket board is still pursuing disciplinary action against the fast bowler. For Indian diaspora cricket fans tracking India cricket live scores and IPL updates, this drama shows how international cricket politics work behind the scenes.

item.title: Prasidh Krishna Purple Cap IPL 2026 | Four-Wicket Haul
item.description: Prasidh Krishna has taken command of the Purple Cap race at IPL 2026 with a four-wicket haul, while Virat Kohli and Rajat Patidar continue their dominance in the Orange Cap standings. US-based Indian cricket fans can catch all the action on ESPN+ and Willow TV.

item.title: ILT20 Season 5 Schedule 2026: Dates & How to Watch
item.description: ILT20 Season 5 shifts to November 22–December 20, 2026, offering Indian cricket fans in the US prime-time viewing for the first time. No more brutal early-morning match times—catch world-class T20 action during convenient holiday weekends instead.

item.title: Karan Johar Meets Meryl Streep & Anne Hathaway in Tokyo 2025
item.description: Karan Johar had an exclusive meeting with Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway in Tokyo that's gone viral on social media. The full conversation will be released soon on platforms like YouTube, Netflix, or Disney+ Hotstar. This rare Bollywood-Hollywood interaction highlights Indian cinema's growing global influence.

item.title: AI Job Displacement: What Indian Tech Pros Need to Know in 2026
item.description: OpenAI's post-AI economy framework signals major disruption for junior-to-mid level engineering roles. Indian tech professionals should pivot toward AI-assisted expertise, specialized domain knowledge, and strategic roles. ChatGPT alternatives and AI tools will eliminate commodity coding work, but create demand for engineers who can architect and direct AI systems.

item.title: Akshay Kumar Real Estate Move 2025: What It Means for Bollywood Stars
item.description: Akshay Kumar leases his premium Mumbai duplex for Rs 1.44 lakh monthly to aircraft commander Anny Divya, showcasing how Bollywood stars diversify wealth through real estate. Meanwhile, new Bollywood movies 2025 continue streaming on Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, and Prime Video, keeping fans connected to their favorite actors both on and off-screen.
